title: Un Mele Oru Kannu Lyrics Rajini Murugan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Un Mele Oru Kannu Song Lyrics
Movie - Rajinimurugan
Singer - Jithin Raj & Mahalakshmi Iyer
Music - D. Imman
Lyrics - Yugabharathi

unmela oru kannu
neethaan en moraponnu
onnoda iva onnu
onna marandha
verum mannu

irukkuren onnaala
parakkuren thannaala
keranguren norungura
paaru na on maappula

unmela oru kannu
naanthaan on
morapponnu.

onnoda iva onnu
onna maranthaa
verum mannu

irukkuren onnaala
parakkuren thannaala
keranguren norunguren
neeyethaan en
maappula.

konchunaa minjura
minjina konjura
yaendi indha naadagam

kenjuna anjura
anjuna kenjura
naalum inga niyabagam

sollaama kollaama
moodi vachchu enna
enna angeyum
ingaeyum alaiya vitta

allaama killaama
noga vachcchu enna
munnaalum ponnaalum
monaga vittu

oththukitta maamanthaan
kattikka vaaren vaaren

unmela oru kannu
neethaan en moraponnu
onnoda iva onnu
onna marandha
verum mannu

vettunaa ottura
ottunaa vettura
loosu paiyan maathiri

kattunaa thottura
thottuna kattura
vaa vaa koluthe veri

kaththaama suththaama
nee irundhaa
unna thittaama
kottaama yaeththukkuven.

nikkaama kikkera
nee koduththaa
michcham vekkaama
kuththaattam pottukkuven.

pottu vechcha ponnu naan
thottuka thaaren thaaren

unmela oru kannu
neethaan en moraponnu
onnoda iva onnu
onna marandha
verum mannu

irukkuren onnaala
parakkuren thannaala
keranguren norungura
neeyethaan en maappula.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Un Mele Oru Kannu'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, highlighting the beauty of the beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Rajini Murugan'?

This song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the lead characters' affection for each other.

Who are the singers of 'Un Mele Oru Kannu'?

The song is sung by Jithan Raj and Mahalakshmi Iyer.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Un Mele Oru Kannu' was composed by D Imman.

When was 'Un Mele Oru Kannu' released?

The song was released on January 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Mele Oru Kannu, the protagonists express their deep affection for each other through heartfelt lyrics and a melodious tune. The song encapsulates the joy and excitement of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia. This enchanting duet is a highlight in the film Rajini Murugan, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Mele Oru Kannu from Rajini Murugan is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Jithan Raj and Mahalakshmi Iyer, paired with D Imman's captivating composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into this melodious journey that beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies.
stanzaMeanings: You are the one who has my heart, but you forgot me and just became a piece of earth.
I am here because of you, I am flying because of you, look at me, I am in your embrace.
You are the one who has my heart.
You forgot me and just became a piece of earth.
I am here because of you, I am flying because of you, I am in your embrace.
If you are a little bit careless, this drama will end.
If you are careless, it will be remembered here every day.
Without saying anything, I kept everything hidden, what all I did here and there.
Without saying anything, I kept everything hidden, whatever happened before or after.
I will come to catch you, I will come.
You are the one who has my heart, but you forgot me and just became a piece of earth.
If you are careless, you will be like a foolish person.
If you are careless, you will be like a foolish person, come, come, let’s have fun.
If you are pure and clean, I will not hit you, I will take care of you.
If you are still, I will not disturb you, I will make you feel good.
I will take care of the girl I have caught.
You are the one who has my heart, but you forgot me and just became a piece of earth.
I am here because of you, I am flying because of you, I am in your embrace.
